name: The Cultured Ruffian
text:
[INTERVIEW]

HR: What are your strengths?

Me:*pulls out & eats an entire pizza*

HR: Wow-Weaknesses?

Me:*pulls out & eats an entire pizza*

name: ceej
text: A sign in the window reads CURED MEATS. Inside, a salami takes his first steps since the accident. A prosciutto learns to forgive.

name: Saucy Kensington
text:
WAITER: Room for dessert?

[flashback to the room at home  that hides all my desserts]

ME: [nervous laugh] Haha I don't have one of those.

name: Because I'm a Guy
text: Pizza burned the inside of my mouth and I don't really understand why the things I love keep hurting me.

name: audrey farnsworth
text: So I'm just supposed to know that you can't eat the outside of the pineapple, like I'm some sort of scientist

name: Anna Kendrick
text: I suspect that low-carb diets work not because they are healthier, but because without carbs I simply lose the will to eat.
